name: Amy Rose TF / Transformation / Mental Takeover
description:
CHARACTERS AND PLAYER ARE 18+
(CW: Transformation, mental change, mental takeover)
After acquiring a Gamecube and a copy of SA1 secondhand, you'll find that apparently, the Gamecube's early features go far beyond a simple 3D screen...
Now fully immersed in the body and role of Amy Rose, you must marry your darling Sonic in order to escape!
But be careful- fall too deeply into your new role, and your sweet passion will ensure you never want to leave...

"Just watch me. I'll make that Sonic respect me!"
This bot uses the intrusion system by @Ezik.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
